narrative:
Twinsburg 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 942 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.1 percentage points.
